person.name: Agnès de THIERN
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Armoirie de la famille de Thiern
d'or, au lion de gueules.

Humbert IV de Beaujeu se marie ([1160]) comme son second mari, avec AGNES de Thiern Dame de Montpensier-en-Auvergne, veuve de Raymond de Bourgogne Comte de Grignon [Capet], fille de Guy de Thiern Seigneur de Montpensier et son épouse ---. 
La source principale qui confirme sa filiation n'a pas été identifiée. Ses deux mariages sont déduits de la Chronique d'Alberic de Trois-Fontaines qui nomme " Agnes de Montepancerii in Alvernia " comme la mère de " domni de Belloioco Wichardi " (son fils par son second mariage) et précise qu'elle était également mère de " Mathilde comitisse Nivernensis " 1] . « Agnes comitissa de Monte Pancero et de Grinnumniaco» Fait don de revenus annuels à Cîteaux, pour les âmes de« domni mei Raimundi filiique nostri Hugonis », par charte datée de 1156 après juin [2] . 

Humbert [IV] et sa femme ont eu trois enfants: 
Sources : 
[1] ChronicaAlbrici Monachi Trium Fontium1222, MGH SS XXIII, p. 912. 
[2] Cîteaux, 150, p. 122. 
relevé JPR TEYSSIER CHALANCON

sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - AGNES de Thiern .

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de THIERN於1132年1月15日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o蒙希時，她的父親Guy d'Auvergne II42歲，母親Raymonde de Bourgogne25歲。她於1145年與Raymond de Bourgogne在法國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1170年在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧享年39歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯洛易貝萊洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de THIERN于1132年1月15日出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o蒙希时，她的父亲Guy d'Auvergne II42岁，母亲Raymonde de Bourgogne25岁。她于1145年与Raymond de Bourgogne在法国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1170年在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧享年39岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯洛易貝萊洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: THIERN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Dominique, Francois.  German Erwin, Wolfgang.
German: probably from Middle High German türse ‘giant’, a nickname for a very tall and perhaps scary person; or for a hunter, from Middle High German tier ‘wild animal, deer’, with excrescent -s.
French (southern): habitational name from a place so named (in Puy-de-Dôme).

variants.name: Thayer
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Somerset): from Middle English the eir ‘the heir’ with fused definite article. See Ayer .
History: Sylvanus Thayer (1785–1872), military engineer, an early superintendant of the US Military Academy at West Point, was born in Braintree, MA, into a family of English origin.

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de THIERN was born on 15 January 1132, in Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Guy d'Auvergne II, was 42 and her mother, Raymonde de Bourgogne, was 25. She married Raymond de Bourgogne in 1145, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1170, in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 39, and was buried in Belleroche, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de THIERN est née le 15 janvier 1132, à Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guy d'Auvergne II, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Raymonde de Bourgogne, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Raymond de Bourgogne en 1145, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1170, à Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Belleroche, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de THIERN am 15. Januar 1132 in Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy d'Auvergne II 42 und ihre Mutter Raymonde de Bourgogne 25. Sie hat 1145 in Frankreich Raymond de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1170 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Belleroche, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de THIERN è nata il il 15 gennaio 1132 nel Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Guy d'Auvergne II, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Raymonde de Bourgogne, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Raymond de Bourgogne nel 1145, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1170, nel Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Belleroche, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de THIERNが1132年1月15日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメモントペンシエルで生まれた時，父Guy d'Auvergne IIは42歳，母Raymonde de Bourgogneは25歳であった。1145年にフランスでRaymond de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1170年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンビーウジェウで39歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスロイアーベラーオチェにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de THIERN(이)가 1132년 1월 15일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 몽펜시어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy d'Auvergne II(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Raymonde de Bourgogne(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1145년 프랑스에서 Raymond de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1170년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니 보j우에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 로이르 벨레록헤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de THIERN nasceu em 15 de janeiro de 1132, em Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guy d'Auvergne II, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Raymonde de Bourgogne, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Raymond de Bourgogne em 1145, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1170, em Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Belleroche, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de THIERN родилась 15 января 1132 г. в местности монтпенсиир, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy d'Auvergne II было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Raymonde de Bourgogne, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raymond de Bourgogne в 1145 г. в местности Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1170 г. в местности боджеу, рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности беллирош, лоир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de THIERN nació el 15 de enero de 1132, en Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guy d'Auvergne II, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Raymonde de Bourgogne, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Raymond de Bourgogne en 1145, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1170, en Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Belleroche, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
